initial_program:
% Number of rows in the input grid
n_rows(NR) :- NR = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.

% Guard for the column index (ensures C is bound)
col(C) :- input(R, C, _).

% Exactly one output per cell
cell(R, C) :- input(R, C, _).
1 { output(R, C, Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- cell(R, C).

% For each nonzero input cell, place its colour at the bottom of its column,
% preserving the relative order of the nonzero cells.
:- input(I, C, V), V != 0,
    col(C),                % bind column C
    n_rows(NR),            % total number of rows
    Cnt = #count{R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0},   % nonzero cells in this column
    Rank = #count{R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0, R2 < I},   % nonzero cells above I
    R_out = NR - Cnt + Rank,                              % final row for this cell
    output(R_out, C, V).

% The multiset of nonzero colours must be preserved
#count{R, C, Col : output(R, C, Col), Col != 0}
   = #count{R, C, Val : input(R, C, Val), Val != 0}.

% For each nonzero input cell, place its colour at the bottom of its column,

:- input(I, C, V), V != 0,
    col(C),                % bind column C
    n_rows(NR),            % total number of rows
    Cnt = #count{R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0},   % nonzero cells in this column
    Rank = #count{R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0, R2 < I},   % nonzero cells above I

rounds.program_after:
% Number of rows in the input grid
n_rows(NR) :- NR = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.

% Guard for the column index (ensures C is bound)
col(C) :- input(R, C, _).

% Exactly one output per cell
cell(R, C) :- input(R, C, _).
1 { output(R, C, Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- cell(R, C).

% For each nonzero input cell, place its colour at the bottom of its column,
% preserving the relative order of the nonzero cells.
:- input(I, C, V), V != 0,
    col(C),                % bind column C
    n_rows(NR),            % total number of rows
    Cnt = #count{R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0},   % nonzero cells in this column
    Rank = #count{R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0, R2 < I},   % nonzero cells above I
    R_out = NR - Cnt + Rank,                              % final row for this cell
    output(R_out, C, V).

% The multiset of nonzero colours must be preserved
preserve :- #count{R, C, Col : output(R, C, Col), Col != 0} = #count{R, C, Val : input(R, C, Val), Val != 0}.

rounds.program_after:
% Number of rows in the input grid
n_rows(NR) :- NR = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.

% Guard for the column index (ensures C is bound)
col(C) :- input(R, C, _).

% Exactly one output per cell
cell(R, C) :- input(R, C, _).
1 { output(R, C, Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- cell(R, C).

% For each nonzero input cell, place its colour at the bottom of its column,
% preserving the relative order of the nonzero cells.
:- input(I, C, V), V != 0,
    col(C),                % bind column C
    n_rows(NR),            % total number of rows
    Cnt = #count{R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0},   % nonzero cells in this column
    Rank = #count{R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0, R2 < I},   % nonzero cells above I
    R_out = NR - Cnt + Rank,                              % final row for this cell
    output(R_out, C, V).

% The multiset of nonzero colours must be preserved
preserve :- #count{R, C, Col : output(R, C, Col), Col != 0} = #count{R, C, Val : input(R, C, Val), Val != 0}.

final_program:
% Number of rows in the input grid
n_rows(NR) :- NR = #count{R : input(R, _, _) }.

% Guard for the column index (ensures C is bound)
col(C) :- input(R, C, _).

% Exactly one output per cell
cell(R, C) :- input(R, C, _).
1 { output(R, C, Col) : color(Col) } 1 :- cell(R, C).

% For each nonzero input cell, place its colour at the bottom of its column,
% preserving the relative order of the nonzero cells.
:- input(I, C, V), V != 0,
    col(C),                % bind column C
    n_rows(NR),            % total number of rows
    Cnt = #count{R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0},   % nonzero cells in this column
    Rank = #count{R2 : input(R2, C, V2), V2 != 0, R2 < I},   % nonzero cells above I
    R_out = NR - Cnt + Rank,                              % final row for this cell
    output(R_out, C, V).

% The multiset of nonzero colours must be preserved
preserve :- #count{R, C, Col : output(R, C, Col), Col != 0} = #count{R, C, Val : input(R, C, Val), Val != 0}.
